name: Sticky (Tobii)
tagline: Tobii's webcam eye tracking for consumer insights
short_impression: Sticky is Tobii's cloud-based webcam eye tracking solution designed for consumer and market research. Leveraging Tobii's decades of eye tracking expertise, Sticky brings professional-grade analysis tools to webcam-based studies. The platform is targeted at marketing teams, UX researchers, and agencies conducting remote user research with attention metrics, heatmaps, and engagement analytics.
pros: Backed by Tobii's eye tracking expertise and validation
cons: Primarily designed for commercial use cases
Less suitable for academic research paradigms
privacy_notes: Data stored on Tobii cloud infrastructure. GDPR and SOC 2 compliant. Consult vendor for detailed privacy policy.
